The '''New Republic War College''' was an educational institution responsible for the preservation of and education on topics of warfare.

Established on [[Woostri/Legends|Woostri]] shortly after the creation of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the War College maintained an extensive library of materials covering the tactics, strategies, weapons, history and general methodologies of warfare and militaries across galactic space and time.

The main branch on Woostri was located near the [[Woostri HoloScan Database|HoloScan Database]] center.
